title: Colotomic Grid: Phasing a Nested Gong Cycle
strategies: trivial block-packing: nest the hierarchy as consecutive integer prefixes and bolt each free instrument onto its own disjoint block right after -- always valid, badly uneven

textbook phase-0 Euclidean rhythms with local repair: build every instrument as a canonical maximally-even pattern starting on the downbeat, then nudge individual onsets that blow the collision cap to the nearest open beat

CRT residue-disjoint phasing: keep every instrument a perfect arithmetic progression (evenness stays 1.0, since evenness is rotation-invariant) and choose each free instrument's phase to land in a residue class, modulo its gcd with every instrument it must avoid, distinct from theirs -- removing collisions at zero evenness cost
entropy-aware residue search: among all CRT-safe phase choices, search further (not just the first valid one) for the assignment that also maximizes the merged inter-onset-interval entropy bonus
